name: purestream-weedy-windflit-gold-automation
source_feedback: feedback/2026-06-29/010315-推荐调整成清流温蒂冬时-挂钩发电承曦格雷伊-130

input.layout_from_debug_bundle: feedback/2026-06-29/010315-推荐调整成清流温蒂冬时-挂钩发电承曦格雷伊-130/debug-bundle.json#/layout
input.operbox: feedback/2026-06-29/010315-推荐调整成清流温蒂冬时-挂钩发电承曦格雷伊-130/operbox.json

linked_producer.reason: 用户期望挂钩承曦格雷伊

manual_review_consensus.method: six read-only subagents; each material block read independently by at least two agents; only cross-agent consistent facts recorded here
facts: 清流 + 温蒂 + 冬时 有人工机制依据，但不是当前 base_systems.json 显式固定三人组。
当前 automation_group 固定的是发电：承曦格雷伊 E2；赤金制造：清流 E1 + 温蒂 E2。
冬时是自动化金线第三人补位/候选；文档中描述无森蚺时用冬时补，但不是 registry system slot。
承曦格雷伊应作为 linked producer / 解释项 / 高档候选前提，不是制造三人同房前提。
普通制造搜索会排除温蒂/冬时这类体系专用干员；不应把它们塞回普通制造搜索。
manufacture/solver.rs 只计算 raw score；不应为该 case 修改 solver。

expected_trace_properties: preferred system candidate is either selected or rejected by explicit raw-score gap/operator conflict/level gate
linked power producer is visible when present

implementation_hints.candidate_source: SystemBaked or equivalent explicit system-candidate source
avoid: do not move 温蒂/冬时 into ordinary manufacture search pool
do not modify manufacture/solver.rs for preference behavior
do not treat 130% as solver-verified for this operbox
do not treat preferred pattern as a hard constraint

uncertainties: 当前 operbox 中温蒂/冬时/承曦格雷伊未达到人工复核中高档候选所需练度；实际 raw score 可能不等于用户 note 的 130%。
max regret / near-optimal tolerance 尚未确定，不能从本 seed 直接推出。
清流 + 温蒂 + 冬时 应作为 system candidate、third-member candidate 还是 trace-only candidate，需要 Phase C 实现设计决定。
notes: This seed records feedback facts and manual-review consensus only; it does not drive runtime or tests yet.
The preferred operators come from user feedback and cross-agent manual review, not from automatic keyword tagging.
Implementation-specific fields are intentionally kept under future_expectations / implementation_hints rather than feedback facts.
